# zstack_webhook (Resource)

Manage webhook in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the webhook.
- `type` (String) The type of the webhook.
- `url` (String) The URL of the webhook.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the webhook.
- `opaque` (String) Opaque content for webhook.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the webhook.
